nasb.text: All Israel who were around them fled at their outcry, for they said, “The earth may swallow us up!”

esv.text: And all Israel who were around them fled at their cry, for they said, “Lest the earth swallow us up!”

cnv.text: 在他們四周的以色列眾人，聽見他們的呼叫，就都逃跑，說：“恐怕地也把我們吞下去。”

ccb.text: 他们四围的以色列人听到他们的喊叫声，纷纷逃跑，生怕自己也被吞下去。
